tools.name: search_by_title
tools.description: Search Swiss federal legislation titles in the Classified Compilation (RS/SR) on Fedlex. Use to find the RS number of a law when you know its name but not its number. Searches titles only, not article content. Returns only acts currently in force.

tools.name: get_article
tools.description: Retrieve a single article when you already know the EXACT article number (e.g. from a cross-reference). Do NOT call this tool repeatedly to search for provisions — use get_law_text instead to fetch the full act or a section and locate relevant articles in the text.

tools.name: get_law_text
tools.description: Retrieve the official consolidated text of a Swiss federal act (or a specific title/chapter) directly from Fedlex (fedlex.admin.ch). This is the PRIMARY tool for answering Swiss law questions — always start here. Fetch the full act or a specific section, then locate relevant provisions in the return

tools.name: list_amendments
tools.description: List consolidation version dates for a Swiss federal act. Returns the dates each consolidated version took effect.
